prompt: {"type":"anime costume design reference sheet","document_info":{"title":"{argument name=\"document title\" default=\"Lumière Noir\"}","subtitle":"{argument name=\"document subtitle\" default=\"衣装設定図\"}","theme":"{argument name=\"costume description\" default=\"black and white classical school idol uniform\"}"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"全体デザイン","position":"top-center","count":3,"labels":["FRONT","SIDE","BACK"],"description":"Full-body anime girl ({argument name=\"character model name\" default=\"M2 一ノ瀬 透花\"}) modeling the outfit"},{"title":"カラーパレット / マテリアル","position":"mid-left","count":8,"labels":["White","Silver","Charcoal","Black","Jacket","Skirt","Lace","Ribbon"],"description":"4 circular color swatches ({argument name=\"color palette\" default=\"White, Silver, Charcoal, Black\"}) and 4 square fabric texture swatches"},{"title":"シルエット・デザインコンセプト","position":"bottom-left","count":3,"description":"Line-art silhouette sketches of the outfit from front, side, and back"},{"title":"ディテールアップ","position":"top-inner-right","count":6,"labels":["襟元・リボン","胸元エンブレム","ジャケットボタン","袖口デザイン","スカート生地・柄","ウエストリボン（背面）"],"description":"Close-up detail panels of the costume parts"},{"title":"アクセサリー / ヘアパーツ","position":"top-outer-right","count":4,"description":"Illustrations of 4 different hair accessories"},{"title":"靴・ソックス","position":"mid-outer-right","count":2,"description":"Illustrations of black strap shoes and white frill socks"},{"title":"メンバー別ヘアアクセサリー・ポイント","position":"bottom-center","count":5,"labels":["M1 霧島 レイ","M2 一ノ瀬 透花","M3 白瀬 真珠","M4 天羽 みこと","M5 九条 玲那"],"description":"Bust portraits of 5 different anime girls showing unique hairstyles and accessories"},{"title":"衣装設定メモ & 参考イメージ","position":"bottom-right","count":4,"description":"Text memo and 4 small photographic reference images of gothic architecture and fabric details"}]}}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"动漫服装设计参考图","document_info":{"title":"{argument name=\"document title\" default=\"Lumière Noir\"}","subtitle":"{argument name=\"document subtitle\" default=\"衣装設定図\"}","theme":"{argument name=\"costume description\" default=\"黑白经典校园偶像制服\"}"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"全体设计","position":"top-center","count":3,"labels":["正面","侧面","背面"],"description":"全身动漫少女（{argument name=\"character model name\" default=\"M2 一ノ瀬 透花\"}）服装展示"},{"title":"配色方案 / 材质","position":"mid-left","count":8,"labels":["白色","银色","炭灰色","黑色","外套","裙子","蕾丝","丝带"],"description":"4 个圆形色卡（{argument name=\"color palette\" default=\"白色, 银色, 炭灰色, 黑色\"}）和 4 个方形面料纹理样本"},{"title":"轮廓与设计理念","position":"bottom-left","count":3,"description":"服装的正面、侧面和背面线条轮廓草图"},{"title":"细节放大","position":"top-inner-right","count":6,"labels":["领口・丝带","胸前徽章","外套纽扣","袖口设计","裙摆面料・花纹","腰部丝带（背面）"],"description":"服装部件的特写细节面板"},{"title":"配饰 / 发饰","position":"top-outer-right","count":4,"description":"4 种不同发饰的插图"},{"title":"鞋子・袜子","position":"mid-outer-right","count":2,"description":"黑色系带鞋和白色荷叶边袜的插图"},{"title":"成员专属发饰・要点","position":"bottom-center","count":5,"labels":["M1 雾岛 礼","M2 一之濑 透花","M3 白濑 真珠","M4 天羽 美琴","M5 九条 玲那"],"description":"5 位不同动漫少女的半身像，展示独特的发型和配饰"},{"title":"服装设定笔记 & 参考图像","position":"bottom-right","count":4,"description":"文字笔记及 4 张关于哥特式建筑和面料细节的小型参考照片"}]}}

breakdown.creativeCore: 偶像服装设计图：生成高度详细的动漫风格服装参考图，包含多视角、材质细节和角色变体。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, full-body]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
